$comment: Payload budgets from docs/full-rewrite-design-2026-07-18.md §2.1, measured in Brotli KB by scripts/ci/bundle-budget.ts --strict. Eager JS/CSS are blocking; the whole-site lazy JS surface remains an advisory drift signal because it is not a per-navigation cost.

notes.platform_shell_eager_js: Sum of brotli sizes of entry (isEntry) JS chunks — the code parsed before interactivity on the feed shell.
notes.platform_eager_css: Sum of brotli sizes of CSS emitted for entry chunks (the render-blocking stylesheet).
notes.total_client_js_warn: Whole client JS surface across all lazy chunks; informational drift signal, not a per-page cost.
